message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. For verification, confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. I still can’t pay right now.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Understood. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. Identity verified. I have the account ending in 1184 with a current amount due of 8400. Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and that no income is expected within 21 days.
